overall.description: Static first-person view from a high-end cyberpunk apartment bedroom, featuring an unmade bed in the foreground and a panoramic window revealing a foggy neon-lit cityscape at night. The scene is rendered in a game engine with cinematic lighting mixing warm interior sources and cool exterior ambient glow, with no camera movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary, positioned near the bed while observing the room interior and the foggy cityscape visible through the window

entered.detail: Unmade bed with rumpled satin sheets in silver and white tones occupying the foreground
Distinctive black and white checkered tile pattern covering the left wall
Large floor-to-ceiling window revealing the exterior cityscape
Dark foggy night view of distant city buildings with scattered lights and cyan neon glow
Contemporary upholstered chair or small sofa visible in the left corner
Rectangular warm light fixture mounted on the ceiling
Cyan-green neon light bleeding in from the right side of the window
Reflective dark flooring visible between the bed and the window

segments.scene_description: The camera remains completely static throughout the segment, capturing a moody cyberpunk bedroom interior. An unmade bed with satin sheets dominates the foreground, while a distinctive checkered wall and modern lounge chair furnish the left side. Through a large panoramic window, a foggy neon-lit cityscape is visible in the distance, illuminated by mixed warm interior lighting and cool cyan exterior ambient glow. No movement, events, or agents are present in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a moody cyberpunk bedroom that remains frozen in a state of quiet atmospheric tension. It begins with a focus on the tactile details of an unmade bed with satin sheets in the foreground, while a checkered wall and modern lounge chair anchor the interior space to the left. As the eye drifts toward the background, the scene opens up to a large panoramic window that reveals a distant, foggy cityscape. The environment is defined by a constant interplay of light, where warm interior sources blend seamlessly into a cool cyan ambient glow emanating from the neon lights outside. Finally, the view settles into a still life of urban solitude, with no movement or agents disrupting the cinematic composition.
